case_title: RYAN S. WARNER VS. MONSANTO COMPANY, A CORPORATION ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-16-2020 CONTINUED TO APR-21-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-08-2022 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) OR FILE NOTICE OF COORDINATION ORDER PURSUANT CRC 3.529. THE SEP-28-2022 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PRODUCTS LIABILITY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WARNER, RYAN S. AS TO DEFENDANT MONSANTO COMPANY, A CORPORATION WILBUR-ELLIS COMPANY, LLC, A CORPORATION WILBUR-ELLIS NUTRITION, LLC (FORMERLY WILBUR-ELLIS FEED, LLC) A CORPORATION DOES 1 THROUGH 100 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-12-2020 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-11-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUL-20-2020
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-25-2021 CONTINUED TO DEC-29-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR STATUS OF COORDINATION. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-08-2022 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-21-2021 CONTINUED TO AUG-25-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR STATUS OF COORDINATION. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-29-2021 CONTINUED TO APR-27-2022 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR STATUS OF COORDINATION. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-27-2022 CONTINUED TO AUG-31-2022 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR STATUS OF COORDINATION. ***NOTE: PLEASE COMPLY WITH CRC 3.529.*** NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 210020737)
